leadText: Not to be confused with Wishing Star or Wishing Stone. A Wishing Piece (Japanese: ねがいのかたまり Wishing Clump) is an item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] A Wishing Piece can be thrown into an inactive Pokémon Den (except the giant den in the Watchtower Ruins or Regigigas 's den in the Giant's Bed ) in the Wild Area , Isle of Armor , or Crown Tundra in order to enable a Max Raid Battle at said den.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Throw one into a Pokémon Den to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.
